content: Just as curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms like ICM prioritize encoding unexpected, high-information new experiences into an agent's memory to accelerate autonomous learning, 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures can be redesigned to gate memory storage and retrieval around intrinsic curiosity signals, rather than just task-specific annotation priority. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where agents proactively seek out unlabeled information that expands their world model, rather than only selecting samples to label for a predefined downstream task.
